title: MRD Resistance Geometry Coverage Report v0

coverage_basis.counting_method: Counts public extraction records and extracted signals by mechanism_group_id for the MRD Resistance Geometry Pilot.
coverage_basis.coverage_status_rule: Zero records means needs-first-extraction; one record means needs-second-source-extraction; two or more records means covered-for-v0-navigation. These are artifact-coverage statuses, not evidence-strength, mechanism-frequency, or clinical-readiness rankings.

mechanism_coverage.label: MRD trajectory split
mechanism_coverage.under_coverage_reason: At least two extraction records currently map to this mechanism bucket.
mechanism_coverage.next_extraction_need: Use current MRD trajectory split coverage for v0 navigation only; do not rank biological importance or infer patient-specific MRD meaning from counts.
coverage_notes: Current coverage combines one primary single-cell residual-clone trajectory study and one retrospective NGS MRD dynamics study.
The two sources use different measurement frames; comparison must preserve assay method, specimen, threshold, time point, and trajectory label.
Covered-for-v0-navigation does not mean sufficient for prognosis, monitoring guidance, treatment choice, or cure claims.

mechanism_coverage.label: Residual transcriptional adaptation
mechanism_coverage.under_coverage_reason: At least two extraction records currently map to this mechanism bucket.
mechanism_coverage.next_extraction_need: Use current residual transcriptional adaptation coverage for v0 navigation only; do not infer treatment selection, monitoring guidance, or patient-specific MRD meaning from counts.
coverage_notes: Current coverage combines one primary single-cell residual-clone trajectory study and one translational single-cell resistance-pathway study.
Comparison must preserve malignant plasma cell state, therapy exposure, assay method, sampling time point, and response context.
Covered-for-v0-navigation does not mean sufficient for pathway ranking, clinical actionability, prognosis, or cure claims.

mechanism_coverage.label: Metabolic resistance state
mechanism_coverage.under_coverage_reason: At least two extraction records currently map to this mechanism bucket.
mechanism_coverage.next_extraction_need: Use current metabolic resistance state coverage for v0 navigation only; do not infer intervention, biomarker, prognosis, or actionability meaning from counts.
coverage_notes: Current coverage combines one primary single-cell residual-clone pathway signal and one review-level lipid-metabolism context source.
The Wang 2025 source does not second-source the exact posttreatment MRD-positive fatty-acid oxidation state; it supports broader metabolic branch navigation.
Coverage does not support a metabolic intervention recommendation, biomarker use, prognosis, or clinical actionability.

mechanism_coverage.label: NF-kB selective state
mechanism_coverage.under_coverage_reason: At least two extraction records currently map to this mechanism bucket.
mechanism_coverage.next_extraction_need: Use current NF-kB selective state coverage for v0 navigation only; do not infer target selection, pathway ranking, prognosis, or actionability meaning from counts.
coverage_notes: Current coverage combines one primary single-cell MRD-positive selective-cell pathway signal and one review-level NF-kB signaling context source.
The Lu 2024 source does not second-source the exact posttreatment selective plasma cell state; it supports broader NF-kB pathway branch navigation.
Coverage does not support pathway ranking, drug-target guidance, biomarker use, prognosis, or clinical actionability.

mechanism_coverage.label: Genetic and nongenetic coupling
mechanism_coverage.under_coverage_reason: At least two extraction records currently map to this mechanism bucket.
mechanism_coverage.next_extraction_need: Use current genetic/nongenetic coupling coverage for v0 navigation only; keep clone identity and transcriptional state as separate fields linked by explicit coupling edges.
coverage_notes: Current coverage combines one source with explicit genetic/nongenetic coupling language and one source with transcriptional clone/state context.
The Cohen 2021 signal supports a narrower clone-state coupling slice rather than broad genetic causality.
Coverage does not establish causal ranking, mechanism dominance, clinical actionability, or patient-specific prognosis.

mechanism_coverage.label: Tumor microenvironment shelter interactions
mechanism_coverage.under_coverage_reason: At least two extraction records currently map to this mechanism bucket.
mechanism_coverage.next_extraction_need: Use current tumor microenvironment shelter interaction coverage for navigation only; do not rank biological importance from counts.
coverage_notes: This is the only current geometry bucket with two extraction records.
Coverage combines one primary single-cell study signal and one review-level context signal.
Covered-for-v0-navigation does not mean sufficient for mechanism ranking, clinical interpretation, or education reuse.

mechanism_coverage.label: Subclone diversity
mechanism_coverage.under_coverage_reason: At least two extraction records currently map to this mechanism bucket.
mechanism_coverage.next_extraction_need: Use current subclone diversity coverage for v0 navigation only; do not infer prognosis, relapse risk, treatment choice, or mechanism ranking from counts.
coverage_notes: Current coverage combines one review-level single-cell context source and one primary genomic evolution study.
Bolli 2014 supports clone-architecture and genomic heterogeneity context; it does not second-source a residual single-cell MRD-state measurement.
Covered-for-v0-navigation does not mean sufficient for prognosis, relapse-risk scoring, treatment choice, or cure claims.

mechanism_coverage.label: Single-cell translation gap
mechanism_coverage.under_coverage_reason: At least two extraction records currently map to this mechanism bucket.
mechanism_coverage.next_extraction_need: Use current single-cell translation gap coverage for v0 navigation only; do not infer clinical implementation readiness, test ordering, platform selection, monitoring guidance, or treatment guidance.
coverage_notes: Current coverage combines two review-level sources that preserve single-cell implementation and translation barriers.
Samur 2023 supports problems and promises of single-cell profiling; it does not establish routine clinical implementation.
Covered-for-v0-navigation does not mean a single-cell test, platform, workflow, or bioinformatics pipeline is clinically ready.

mechanism_coverage.label: T-cell therapy pressure
mechanism_coverage.under_coverage_reason: At least two extraction records currently map to this mechanism bucket.
mechanism_coverage.next_extraction_need: Use current T-cell therapy pressure coverage for v0 navigation only; do not infer product comparison, target selection, treatment sequencing, patient-specific therapy fit, or trial fit.
coverage_notes: Current coverage combines one review-level treatment-landscape context source and one observational BCMA CAR T-cell immune-state source.
Ledergor 2024 supports therapy-pressure and immune-state context; it does not establish therapy sequencing, target choice, or product comparison.
Covered-for-v0-navigation does not mean sufficient for treatment guidance, trial guidance, prognosis, or cure claims.

mechanism_coverage.label: Unmet high-risk context
mechanism_coverage.under_coverage_reason: At least two extraction records currently map to this mechanism bucket.
mechanism_coverage.next_extraction_need: Use current unmet high-risk context coverage for v0 navigation only; do not infer patient-specific prognosis, eligibility, therapy fit, trial fit, monitoring guidance, or treatment selection.
coverage_notes: Current coverage combines one review-level treatment-landscape context source and one cohort-scale genomic high-risk validation source.
Schavgoulidze 2026 supports high-risk genomic context and disease-timing context; it does not provide patient-specific prognosis or treatment guidance.
Covered-for-v0-navigation does not mean sufficient for eligibility, therapy fit, trial fit, monitoring, or cure claims.

interpretation_boundary: Coverage counts are public artifact coverage metrics only.
Coverage counts are not evidence-strength rankings.
Coverage counts are not mechanism-frequency estimates.
Coverage counts are not biological-importance rankings.
Covered-for-v0-navigation does not mean clinically ready.
Needs-second-source-extraction means more source extraction is needed before comparison; it does not mean low priority or low importance.
This report is not medical advice, diagnostic guidance, treatment guidance, trial guidance, patient-specific MRD interpretation, or a cure claim.

review_notes: Built from the MRD Resistance Geometry Pilot and the eleven current source-specific geometry extraction records.
Phase 2 adds Cohen 2021 as a second-source extraction for residual-state biology and clone-state coupling.
Phase 4 adds Wang 2025 and Lu 2024 as review-level second-source extractions for metabolic and NF-kB pathway-state branches.
Phase 5 adds Bolli 2014 for subclone diversity and Ledergor 2024 for T-cell therapy pressure.
Phase 6 adds Samur 2023 for single-cell translation readiness and Schavgoulidze 2026 for unmet high-risk context.
Current coverage has zero first-extraction gaps, zero second-source gaps, and ten buckets covered for v0 navigation.
Counts reflect public artifact structure, not strength of evidence, mechanism frequency, clinical readiness, or cure progress.
External human outreach is not required; Phase 6 routes next movement through falsification, transition modeling, and benchmark checks.
